public_reputation: Orderly guide who routes visitors, prevents ritual disruption, and maintains sacred access at Celestial Enclave.
appearance: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair carries the marks of pilgrim warden in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a pilgrim warden whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Celestial Enclave.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of pilgrim warden in and around Celestial Enclave, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Celestial Enclave while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Celestial Enclave.
Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a pilgrim warden.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair is readable as a pilgrim warden tied to Celestial Enclave.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Celestial Enclave: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair presents as someone shaped by the duties of a pilgrim warden and the daily pressures of Celestial Enclave.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a pilgrim warden, and proof that strangers will not make Celestial Enclave harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a pilgrim warden too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair always knows more about Celestial Enclave than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to pilgrim warden duties in Celestial Enclave.
social_texture: Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Celestial Enclave, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Pilgrim touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Pilgrim Warden Celune Vair when the party needs a socially grounded face for Celestial Enclave: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
